k5_system_recap: >>> RECAP: The tower of Archmage Aldric was reached. Aldric discovered a temporal anomaly in the hero - traces of a time rift. The library contained forbidden knowledge about time magic. The tower guardian Sentinel was defeated. At the summit, a scroll in Aldric's handwriting from another timeline read: 'The key is the hero himself.' A.R.I.A. briefly remembered Aldric - from another life.
k5_protag_return: Finally back in Eldenrath. But something feels different.
k5_aria_uneasy: You're right. The mood in the village is... tense. People are whispering.
k5_system_village: >>> Eldenrath scan: Elevated unrest among the population. Multiple reports of thefts in recent days.
k5_protag_healer: Look - over there. Someone's healing the wounded. A stranger.
k5_luna_intro: Easy, easy... The wound is deep, but I can close it. Just keep breathing.
k5_aria_luna_scan: Her healing magic is... remarkable. Not a normal healing spell. This is something deeper, more primal.
k5_luna_gentle: Oh, hello! You look like adventurers. I'm Luna - a wandering healer. I go where I'm needed.
k5_protag_curious: You seem like you've seen a lot, Luna. Where are you from, actually?
k5_choice_ask_past: Tell me about your past. I'd like to get to know you better.
k5_choice_respect_past: You don't have to share if you don't want to. Some stories need time.
k5_luna_past_tell: My home... There was a place. Small, peaceful. On the edge of a forest that appeared on no map. One day it was simply... gone. As if it had never existed.
k5_protag_sorry: I'm sorry, Luna. Losing an entire place... I can't imagine what that feels like.
k5_luna_past_end: Sometimes I wonder if it was even real. But the scars in my heart tell me it was.
k5_protag_respect: Your story belongs to you, Luna. When you're ready to tell it, I'll listen.
k5_luna_grateful: Thank you. That means more than you know. Most people ask out of curiosity, not compassion.
k5_protag_theft: What happened here? Half the market stalls have been looted!
k5_aria_theft: This wasn't ordinary theft. Professional, systematic. Someone with experience is behind this.
k5_system_theft: >>> Theft pattern analysis: High-precision targeting. Only valuables affected. Security systems bypassed. Probability of organized crime: 96%.
k5_aria_reveals_kael: I followed Kael. Last night. He met with members of the Shadow Guild. He's working for them.
k5_aria_proof: I recorded every detail. The exchange, the code words, the meeting point. There's no doubt.
k5_kael_defense: Wait, wait, WAIT! It's not what it looks like!
k5_aria_counter: You stole from an entire village, Kael. What's there to explain?
k5_kael_orphans: The money goes to the orphans in the south! The guild takes their cut, but the rest... Every single gold piece goes to children who have NOTHING! You think I do this for fun?!
k5_luna_both: Stop it, both of you. Can you hear yourselves? There's no easy answer here.
k5_system_fate: >>> FATE CHOICE DETECTED. This decision will fundamentally influence the course of the story.
k5_choice_trust_aria: Aria is right. Stealing is wrong, no matter who it's for. I stand with her.
k5_choice_trust_kael: Kael means well. The children need help. I stand with him.
k5_protag_trust_aria: I'm sorry, Kael. But theft isn't the way. We'll find another solution for the children.
k5_kael_betrayed: So... you chose the perfect little companion. Fine. Then I guess I'm the villain in your story.
k5_aria_guild_location: His guild contact is meeting tonight at the old warehouse. If we act fast, we can catch the guild boss himself.
k5_protag_trust_kael: Kael's heart is in the right place. The children are real. Aria, you don't always have to be right.
k5_aria_disappointed: Then... I wasn't enough for you. I understand.
k5_kael_thanks: You won't regret this. Come with me - I'll show you what this is all for.
k5_aria_grateful_trust: Thank you for trusting me. I won't betray that trust. Let's hold this guild accountable.
k5_protag_guild: Show me the way. This guild boss has done enough damage.
k5_kael_show_orphanage: Here. Look at it. Twenty children, no home, no parents. And this is all I could do for them.
k5_protag_orphanage: So many children... You were telling the truth.
k5_system_bounty: >>> WARNING: Bounty hunter signature detected. Approaching position. Combat readiness advised.
k5_aria_sylas_done: Sylas is defeated. The guild will fall apart without their leader.
k5_kael_farewell: Over here, hero. I'm leaving. You chose your side, and I chose mine. But... thanks for the time in the forest. Take care.
k5_kael_ravok_done: The bounty hunter is history! Man, he was tough. But we were tougher!
k5_protag_aria_left: Aria... She left. Without a word.
k5_luna_whisper: I... I need to tell you something. Quietly. So only you hear it.
k5_luna_seen_before: This fracture... Friends splitting apart over a choice... I've seen this before. In my village. Before it vanished.
k5_system_luna_anomaly: >>> Temporal micro-anomaly detected on subject 'Luna'. Signature weak but consistent with time rift residual resonance. Analysis incomplete.
